headline: Generation Investment Management Sold Gartner (IT) Due to Fear of AI Disruption
summary: Generation Investment Management, an investment management firm, released its “Global Equity Strategy” fourth quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter is available to download here. In 2025, uncertainty and distortion shaped the market. The letter highlights the need for patient, quality-focused investing. The firm believes its portfolio is well-positioned for future success, as […]

headline: Cyara Launches Agentic Testing to Help Enterprises Deploy AI Agents With Confidence
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, March 31, 2026--Cyara, the global leader in AI-powered customer experience (CX) assurance, today announced new agentic testing and AI governance capabilities that give enterprises the tools to validate, monitor, and control AI agents across voice and digital channels, before and after those agents interact with customers.

headline: From rejected category to modern 4PL: Redwood’s path through Gartner analysis
summary: Redwood Logistics proposed “Logistics Platform as a Service” but followed analyst guidance to reposition as a modern 4PL, earning Visionary status in Gartner’s inaugural 4PL Magic Quadrant. The post From rejected category to modern 4PL: Redwood’s path through Gartner analysis appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: Assessing Gartner (IT) Valuation As Legal Action And AI Competition Keep Growth In Focus
summary: Gartner (IT) is back in focus after a securities fraud class action was filed, tying alleged misstatements about contract value growth to a period of slowing metrics and growing pressure on parts of its business. See our latest analysis for Gartner. The legal action and concerns about slowing contract value growth come after a sharp reset in sentiment. A 90 day share price return of 37.49% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 62.09% point to fading momentum, despite a recent 2.39% 1 day...
